name: Blockade of Frost
description:
Slam your staff down to create an ice barrier in front of you, dealing 281 Frost Damage to enemies in the target area every 1 second and applying Frost Safeguard for 6 seconds to you and nearby allies that absorbs up to 4267 damage from projectiles.

Chilled enemies are afflicted with Minor Breach and their Movement Speed is reduced by 40% for 4 seconds.
